headline: The Best ETFs For $100 Oil To Buy Right Now
summary: WTI crude oil is trading near $105 per barrel, a level that was unthinkable just a few months ago when prices bottomed near $57 late last year. The catalyst is geopolitical: disruptions to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz sent prices surging in early March, and the rally has held above the triple-digit threshold ever ... The Best ETFs For $100 Oil To Buy Right Now

headline: Buffett may end donations to Gates charity over Bill's ties to Epstein
summary: Revelations about Jeffrey Epstein's ties to Bill Gates have strained his friendship with Warren Buffett and the Omaha billionaire's annual multi-billion-dollar donations to the Gates Foundation.
